body:value: Get data on maximum & minimum performing public health facilities on selected data items across sub districts of Andhra Pradesh. Selected data items are deliveries conducted at facility, C -Section deliveries at facility, IPD attendance, OPD attendance (all), operation major (general and spinal anaesthesia) & operation minor (no or local anaesthesia). Data contains  total no. of facilities, number of facilities reporting nil performance, details of maximum and minimum performing facilities (name,  sub-district, value reported) etc.

Andhra Pradesh
field_group_name:name: Health Management Information System
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Department of Health and Family Welfare
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Family Welfare
Health
title: Maximum & Minimum Performing Public Health Facilities on Selected Data Items across sub districts of Andhra Pradesh

Data contains  total no. of facilities, number of facilities reporting nil performance, details of maximum and minimum performing facilities (name,  sub-district, value reported) etc.

Uttar Pradesh
field_group_name:name: Health Management Information System
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Department of Health and Family Welfare
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Family Welfare
Health
title: Maximum & Minimum Performing Public Health Facilities on Selected Data Items across sub districts of Uttar Pradesh

body:value: The catalog contains the details of natural & un-natural accidents, traffic accidents and suicides. Major causes of accidental deaths are Traffic accidents, Drowning, Lightning, Heart Attacks, Accidental Fire, Falls, Poisoning. Major causes of Suicides are Family Problems, Illness, Bankruptcy or Indebtedness.

body:value: The catalog contains the details of natural & un-natural accidents,  traffic accidents and suicides. Major causes of accidental deaths are Traffic accidents,  Drowning,  Lightning,  Heart Attacks,  Accidental Fire,  Falls,  Poisoning. Major causes of Suicides are Family Problems,  Illness,  Bankruptcy or Indebtedness,  with Percentage Variation Age and Gender-wise Distribution ,  It includes Data of All India Level,  The information given in this report is police recorded data which has been obtained through State/UT Police,  It includes Total number of Accidental Deaths with MidYear Projected Population and Rate of Accidental Deaths.

body:value: The data indicates about Index of Industrial Production (IIP). The IIP is a composite indicator that measures the changes in the volume of production of a basket of industrial products during a given period with respect to the volume of production in a chosen base period. The data refers to the General Index as well as for each industry group.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: MOSPI
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation
field_sector:name: Industries
Statistics
title: Index of Industrial Production

body:value: Get the data regarding to the Automobile production in India. It describes the category wise production of automobiles as per the following categories: Passenger Vehicles (PVs), Commercial Vehicles (CVs) M & HCVs, LCVs, Three Wheelers and Two wheelers. In these categories the production is also mentioned subcategory-wise namely  Passenger Cars, Multi-Utility Vehicles, Goods Carriers, Scooter, Motorcycles etc.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: MOSPI
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation
field_sector:name: Industries
Manufacturing
Statistics
title: Category-wise Automobile Production

body:value: The data includes average number of monthly export and import combined transactions handled at different major ports of India. The data source is DGCIS, Kolkata.

title: Average Monthly Export & Import Transactions from Major Port

body:value: The data contains export value of major commodities based on principal commodities from major ports of India . The data includes export value in Indian rupee. The source of the data is Directorate General of Commercial Intelligence and Statistics (DGCIS), Kolkata.  The data can be useful for different stake holders of trade including govt. departments, different regulators and logistics providers.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Principal Commodity
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Commerce and Industry
Department of Commerce
Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT)
field_sector:name: Commerce
Export
title: Export data of major commodities through major ports

body:value: The data contains import value of major commodities based on Principal Commodities from major ports of India. The data includes import value in Indian rupee. The source of data is Directorate General of Commercial Intelligence and Statistics (DGCIS), Kolkata. The data can be useful for different stake holders of trade including govt. departments, different regulators and logistics providers.
